title: VimFu — Ctrl-O
description: Ctrl-O jumps to the older position in the jump list. Go back to where you were before a search, G, or other jump.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with line numbers

steps.say: Control O jumps to the older position in the jump list. It takes you back to where you were.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: jump with G, then go back ---

steps.say: We're on line one. Jump to the bottom with capital G.
Now we're at the end. Control O goes back.
Back to line one. Vim remembered where we were.

steps.comment: --- Demo 2: search creates a jump too ---

steps.say: Search also creates a jump. Search for play.
Jumped to the play method. Control O goes back to where we searched from.
Back to line one again. Every search, every G, every jump gets recorded.
Control O. Jump backward through your history. Like a browser back button for code.
